message:
fix: add timeout protection to gt handoff blocking operations (gt-s9ib)

Wrap all subprocess and Dolt calls in gt handoff with timeouts to prevent
indefinite hangs when Dolt is slow/unresponsive:

- collectHandoffState(): 5s timeout per subprocess (gt hook, gt mail inbox,
  bd ready, bd list) — non-critical, fail gracefully
- sendHandoffMail(): 15s timeout for bd create and bd update calls
- hookBeadForHandoff(): 15s timeout for bd show and bd update calls
- cleanupMoleculeOnHandoff(): 10s timeout for Dolt library operations
  (DetachMoleculeWithAudit, forceCloseDescendants, ForceCloseWithReason)
- Polecat gt done redirect: 15s timeout

Also adds BuildContext() method to bdCmd builder for context-aware
subprocess execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
